parameters.text:
=👋 Hey *{{ $('Pick Reviewer').first().json.reviewer.displayName }}*!

You've been auto-assigned to peer review a story:

*{{ $('Pick Reviewer').first().json.summary }}*
🔗 https://{{ $vars.JIRA_DOMAIN }}/browse/{{ $('Pick Reviewer').first().json.issueKey }}

You were picked because you have the lightest in-progress load on the board right now ({{ $('Pick Reviewer').first().json.reviewer.points }} pts). You're the hero we need! 🚀

_This was assigned automatically. If you're unavailable, please reassign manually._
